message:
fix(fr-store): function_load extracts per-function description from register_function table-form (br-frankenredis-r85v)

Self-review of the FUNCTION DUMP body work caught another real
defect: extract_function_name extracted only the function name
from redis.register_function{function_name='n', description='d',
callback=fn} and dropped the description. FUNCTION LIST then
always returned description=nil for every function even when
the script set it.

Replace extract_function_name with extract_function_metadata
that returns (name, Option<description>). Both function_load
call sites (initial registration and FUNCTION RESTORE body
parsing) now capture the description and surface it via
FUNCTION LIST.

New test function_load_extracts_per_function_description_from_table_form
pins the table-form parsing.

fr-store 291 passed; fr-command 656 passed; cargo clippy --tests
-D warnings clean; cargo fmt --check clean.

Slice of br-frankenredis-r85v.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
